description: Golden contract tests for the Tunisia Law MCP. Corpus quarantined 2026-04-26 — every search returns an empty result set; every lookup returns not-found. Tests assert the empty-corpus contract until Phase 4 backfill restores coverage.

tests.description: While the corpus is quarantined, search must return zero results.
Empty-corpus contract for any other query.
While the corpus is quarantined, lookup of any document id must return not-found.
